title: COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER - 211info
text: YMCA OF DOUGLAS COUNTY COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreational opportunities, including racquetball, pickle ball, basketball, family activities, ADA accessible hot tubs, a steam room, a sauna, and two pools. Also has a gym with group exercise classes, swimming classes for all ages and abilities, water safety education, specialized wellness programs for seniors and people living with chronic diseases, preschool and after school child care programs, children's play groups, and a teen program. 1151 NW Stewart Parkway Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Unrestricted; individuals must not have a registered sex offense or conviction of a violent crime. -Preschool serves ages 2.5-5 -After school child care program Kindergarten-5th grade Hours: Monday-Friday 5am-8pm, Saturday 8am-5pm Email (541) 440-9622 230 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 440-9622 Main phone (541) 440-6863 FAX Alternate (541) 440-9622 ext 230 Child Care Rochelle Van Slyke [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Membership Fees: -Youth (ages 0-18) $33/month -Young Adult (ages 19-25) $41/month -Adult (ages 26-59) $58/month -Family $79/month -Senior Adult (ages 60 and older) $53/month -Senior Family $74/month -Financial assistance is available to those with low incomes that can demonstrate financial need -Many insurances accepted DOCUMENTS: -DMV issued ID for those 18 years or older -Proof of current mailing address AREA SERVED: Douglas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the corner of Stewart Parkway and Harvey Street Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Preschools Swimming Facilities Therapeutic Exercise Water Safety Education Y Facilities Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YMCA OF DOUGLAS COUNTY
